-1.event_info: Initial trigger for WorkerAgent to start receiving leadership attention

-2.event_info: Initial trigger for LeaderAgent to start providing feedback and tasks

-3.event_info: Initial trigger for TeamAgent to start team interactions

1.event_info: WorkerAgent acknowledges leadership attention and sends response

fields.name: worker_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the WorkerAgent acknowledging leadership attention.

fields.name: leadership_attention_level
fields.description: Level of leadership attention received by WorkerAgent.

fields.name: response_message
fields.description: Message sent by WorkerAgent in response to leadership attention.

2.event_info: WorkerAgent adjusts productivity based on leadership attention and team support

fields.name: worker_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the WorkerAgent adjusting productivity.

fields.name: new_productivity_level
fields.description: The adjusted level of productivity of the WorkerAgent.

fields.name: adjustment_reason
fields.description: Reason for productivity adjustment, influenced by leadership attention or team support.

3.event_info: LeaderAgent provides feedback and tasks to WorkerAgent

fields.name: leader_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the LeaderAgent providing feedback.

fields.name: worker_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the WorkerAgent receiving feedback.

fields.name: feedback_content
fields.description: Content of the feedback provided by LeaderAgent.

fields.name: task_assigned
fields.description: Task assigned to WorkerAgent along with feedback.

4.event_info: LeaderAgent evaluates the response of WorkerAgent to provided feedback

fields.name: leader_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the LeaderAgent evaluating the response.

fields.name: worker_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the WorkerAgent whose response is being evaluated.

fields.name: evaluation_outcome
fields.description: Outcome of the evaluation performed by LeaderAgent.

5.event_info: TeamAgent initiates interaction and provides support to WorkerAgent

fields.name: team_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the TeamAgent providing support.

fields.name: worker_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the WorkerAgent receiving team support.

fields.name: support_type
fields.description: Type of support provided by TeamAgent to WorkerAgent.

fields.name: interaction_details
fields.description: Details of interaction initiated by TeamAgent.
